choiceRules.sampleCohort: Each character uses only that character's runs and Ancient choice screens.
choiceRules.pick: Pick rate uses the configured winning-run cohort: each option shown contributes one offer and was_chosen contributes one pick.
choiceRules.pickedWinRate: Picked win rate uses the official solo A10 version snapshots: each run containing the chosen Ancient relic contributes once, and a winning run contributes one picked win.
choiceRules.key: Runtime matching uses the option key after the final .options. segment.

outcomeSource.method: For official Ancient-pool relics, per-run relic membership identifies the option as picked; entity snapshot picks/wins provide the outcome counts.
